name: yiru
description: Next-gen IDE for parallel agentic development

scripts.check: vp check --fix && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run verify:repository-contracts
scripts.verify:repository-contracts: node config/scripts/run-vite-plus-lint-profile.mjs switch-exhaustiveness src/main src/preload src/shared src/relay src/cli src/renderer/src config tests --quiet && node config/scripts/check-styled-scrollbars.mjs && node config/scripts/check-design-token-budget.mjs && pnpm run check:reliability-gates && pnpm run check:max-lines-ratchet && pnpm run verify:bundled-skill-guides && pnpm run verify:skill-bundle-manifest && pnpm run verify:localization-catalog && pnpm run verify:localization-coverage
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p config/tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p config/tsconfig.tc.cli.json && tsc --noEmit -p config/tsconfig.tc.web.json
scripts.build:cli: tsc -p config/tsconfig.cli.json --outDir out --composite false --incremental false && node config/scripts/verify-cli-bin.mjs --fix-executable --fix-package-json && node config/scripts/install-dev-cli.mjs
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build:relay && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:electron-vite && pnpm run build:web
scripts.build: pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run build:native
scripts.build:release: pnpm run build:relay && pnpm run build:native && pnpm run verify:computer-native && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:electron-vite && pnpm run build:web
scripts.build:unpack: pnpm run build && pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && electron-builder --config config/electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.build:win: pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && electron-builder --config config/electron-builder.config.cjs --win
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run build:computer-macos && pnpm run build:notification-status-macos && pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && electron-builder --config config/electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run build:desktop && pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && electron-builder --config config/electron-builder.config.cjs --linux AppImage deb
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && npx playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project=electron-headless
scripts.test:e2e:terminal-rendering-golden: pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-raw-emoji-table-scroll-restore.spec.ts tests/e2e/terminal-webgl-atlas-budget.spec.ts --grep @terminal-rendering-golden --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project electron-headless --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:terminal-rendering-release-evid: pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-opencode-emoji-table-rendering.spec.ts tests/e2e/terminal-long-table-scroll-restore.spec.ts --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project electron-headless --workers=2
scripts.test:e2e:terminal-perf: pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-typing-latency.spec.ts tests/e2e/terminal-foreground-redraw-freeze.spec.ts tests/e2e/terminal-output-scheduler.spec.ts tests/e2e/terminal-hidden-tui-visual-restore.spec.ts tests/e2e/artificial-opencode-terminal-load.spec.ts --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project electron-headless --workers=2
scripts.test:e2e:headful: pnpm run ensure:electron-runtime && npx playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project electron-headful
